g.text: CPU writes chars and reads queued input
selection index in A, state returns to CPU
fetch lane + operand lane + read/write strobes
program bytes, stack, userland strings, and data
A -> X, B -> Y, RGB registers, draw/clear strobes
256x256 RGB pixels driven by x/y/color latches
page latch + address mux + B data out
paged storage device addressed by page:offset
operand points into RAM; strings become URL/body; response returns byte stream
